cfo: Ana Russo (transitioning to Raphael Denadai, April 2026)
recent_name_changes: None. New Global COO (Nikitas Psyllakis) appointed Dec 2025; CFO transition to Raphael Denadai planned April 2026. Acquired 51% stake in Solis Investimentos (effective Jan 2, 2026), adding ~US$3.5B FEAUM to Credit.
headquartered: Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands (operations primarily in Brazil/Latin America)
